_comment: Manually blocked dates for bookings made outside this website (e.g. Facebook Messenger). Add one entry per booking below. 'start' is the check-in date, 'end' is the check-out date (end is NOT blocked, since a new guest can check in that day). Example: {"start": "2026-08-01", "end": "2026-08-03", "source": "Facebook Messenger", "note": "Juan Dela Cruz"}
